title: Out of the Bush
description: Instead of replacing poppies with roses, why not keep both?
body:
Most packs that restore roses replace poppies, and most use the old texture. This one has new textures, based on the original rose texture from 1.7 and the Rose **Bush**'s texture, and does not completely replace poppies, instead just has a 50/50 chance of being a poppy or rose! There is a rarer version of the rose too, and veterans might already know what i'm talking about...

![Insert odds of getting the different roses here](https://i.imgur.com/tPyiVLV.gif)

Now Vanilla Minecraft is better!

Please report bugs on [this pack's PlanetMinecraft page](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/out-of-the-bush-instead-of-replacing-poppies-with-roses-why-not-keep-both/), Modrinth doesn't have comments so that leaves the PMC page for bugs to be reported to.
